zh_cn.title: BR copyright alerts grouped by Account Manager — preview

content.text: Preview note: the BR tracker does not have an explicit Account Manager column, so this grouping uses the BD column as the AM proxy for now.
• UPC 047752352704 — Artist: Sena, DJ Marques, Kyan — Title: Água Limpa — Status: Pending/Investigating
• UPC 044317902701 — Artist: DJ MVB7, MC VK DA VS — Title: TOMA SURRA — Status: Pending/Investigating
Source window used for “today”: tracker rows dated 2026-06-17 (current BR business day relative to runtime).
